markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy for the new App Access campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Campaign:** Siit is launching a multi-channel "App Access" campaign next week, targeting 200–230 MQLs this quarter by automating app provisioning.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Content Pivot:** GrowthX's initial proposal to convert high-traffic tool pages was paused. The new focus is creating ICP-targeted content for the campaign, with a 50/50 split between "App Access" and "always-on" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [**New Conversion Test:** A universal ROI calculator will be built to convert traffic across all pages (blogs, tools, ads). This test was chosen over tool-specific pages to avoid attracting non-ICP visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [**Immediate Actions:** GrowthX will deliver two blogs by Monday to enable the campaign launch and then begin keyword research for a new "App Access" content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

## Topics

### App Access Campaign

  - [**Objective:** Generate 200–230 MQLs (trials & demos) this quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Organic Goal:** 60 MQLs from search.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Problem:** Manual app provisioning is slow, creates Shadow IT, and delays employee productivity.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Solution:** Siit's AI agent automates provisioning via Identity Providers (IDPs) like Okta and JumpCloud.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Target Audiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Okta users](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [JumpCloud users](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Microsoft Entra ID users](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Google users (managing access via Slack/spreadsheets)](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Channels:** Email nurture (segmented by IDP), Google/Bing Ads, Reddit, organic social, LinkedIn ads (test), YouTube, and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Initial Proposal (GrowthX):** Create tool-specific landing pages to convert high-traffic tool review pages (\~800 organic clicks/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Piggyback on existing demand for adjacent problems.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [**Feedback (Carmel):**](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**Niche Focus:** "App access for Linear" is too narrow; the pain point is general provisioning automation.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
      - [**ICP Mismatch:** Tool pages attract non-ICP visitors; editorial content is more effective for reaching the target audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pivot from tool-specific pages to creating ICP-focused content for the App Access campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### New Conversion Test: ROI Calculator

  - [**Idea:** Build a universal ROI calculator to convert traffic across the entire site.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A single, high-value asset can be embedded everywhere (blogs, ads, email signatures), solving the distribution challenge that causes many calculators to fail.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=2839.0)
  - [**Execution:** Siit will provide the logic; GrowthX will handle the build.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Deliver two blogs by Monday, Jan 12, to enable the campaign launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Create new content artifacts for the "App Access" campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for a new "App Access" content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Create a ticket to scope the ROI calculator build.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)
  - [**Siit:**](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)
      - [Provide the ROI calculator logic to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Kdj3Q6686Zy9KduQB96FhDq_t5evzU-v?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)
